niceToHave.title: Consider Owner field policy (single-dev pre-launch)
niceToHave.why: Owner='Tim' is reasonable per spec Q1 guidance but creates a coupling vs the team-handoff narrative (`single-dev pre-launch` parenthetical). Other TD entries (TD-7, TD-12) omit Owner entirely. Slight inconsistency.
niceToHave.fix: Optional: drop Owner bullet to match TD-7/TD-12 convention, OR leave as-is — both acceptable per spec § Open Questions Q2.

niceToHave.title: Worktree contamination from concurrent agent (informational)
niceToHave.why: git diff HEAD shows MASTER.md modified alongside TECH_DEBT.md, but the T1.3 green-diff at /tmp/audit-s1-T1.3-green.diff is clean (TECH_DEBT.md only). mtime evidence: TECH_DEBT.md 19:46:39, green-diff 19:46:53, MASTER.md 19:47:10 — MASTER.md was edited by a concurrent agent AFTER T1.3 snapshot, not by T1.3 editor. NOT a scope violation by T1.3.
niceToHave.fix: No action required for T1.3 review. Orchestrator should ensure commit isolates only T1.3's TECH_DEBT.md hunk; MASTER.md belongs to a sibling task.

verifications.scopeBoundary: PASS — green-diff /tmp/audit-s1-T1.3-green.diff = 37 lines, 1 diff --git block, ONLY docs/TECH_DEBT.md. git diff --stat HEAD shows 2 files (TECH_DEBT.md +26, MASTER.md ±8) — MASTER.md hunks are from a concurrent agent (mtime 19:47:10 > green-diff snapshot 19:46:53), not from T1.3 editor.
verifications.antiHallucination: PASS — opened museum-backend/tsconfig.json (no noUncheckedIndexedAccess confirmed), museum-frontend/tsconfig.json:5 + museum-web/tsconfig.json:8 (both `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true`), grep -c '[0]' on 3 cited BE files = 0/0/0 (matches Note transparence claim), find museum-backend/src '-name *.ts' | xargs grep -l '[0]' | wc -l = 38 (matches '38 fichiers BE' claim). All cited file paths and counts verified.
verifications.specCompliance:
- AC (1) raison du défer pré-launch: MET (line 407, '35-50 sites... P0 langfuse + JWKS prioritaires')
- AC (2) sites estimés: MET (line 407 enumerates similarity.service.ts, chat-repository-queries.ts, chat.repository.typeorm.ts, jsonb-validator.ts, sources-validator.ts)
- AC (3) deadline post-V1 sprint 1: MET (line 411 'post-V1 sprint 1 (fenêtre 2026-06-01 → 2026-06-30)')
- AC (4) trigger noUncheckedIndexedAccess en review: MET (line 410, 3 alternative triggers)
- AC entrée datée 2026-05-16: MET (4 occurrences in TD-16 block; total file count 14 ≥ baseline+1)
- AC format § Convention: MET (### TD-16 heading, Statut/Référence code/Symptôme/Sprint d'origine/Effort estimé bullets present)
- AC ID séquentiel TD-16: MET (TD-1..TD-15 unchanged, TD-16 first new)
- AC insertion AVANT ## Tech debts fermés: MET (TD-16 at line 397, Tech debts fermés section at line 423)
- AC scope boundary (TECH_DEBT.md only): MET for T1.3 editor (green-diff confirms); worktree-level contamination by sibling agent on MASTER.md is out of T1.3 ownership

summary: T1.3 ships a well-structured TD-16 entry that mirrors TD-7/TD-12 conventions, satisfies every spec AC verbatim, and demonstrates exemplary UFR-013 honesty via the 'Note' bullet that admits the 3 cited files contain 0 direct `[0]` occurrences while contextualizing the 38-file BE-wide signal. Green-diff is strictly scoped to docs/TECH_DEBT.md; the MASTER.md modifications visible in git status originate from a concurrent agent (mtime evidence) and do not impact T1.3 review. Approved without modifications.
